widgets_values: Smaller values on Grow Mask lead to stronger effect

nodes.title: (Face fix) Main prompt and extra prompt
widgets_values: change character face on image 1 to match character face from image 2

nodes.title: Information
widgets_values:
### Tips
For better result try appending style information at pre-processing pose prompt
- Style: photography
- Style: anime/cartoon
- Style: monochrome comics

For example:
```
remove hair, remove clothes and draw this person bald and in skin tone underwear. Style: photography
```

To control head-to-body ratio try adding instructions like
- with small head
- wiht big anime head

nodes.title: (Combine) Main prompt and extra prompt
widgets_values: Change character on image 1 to match character from image 2

Replace character from image1 with character from image2. The resulting image should copy camera angle, pose and facial expression from image1 but retain character design, clothes and style of image2
 
girl is standing with her hands on hips
breasts, woman, large breasts, small head
remove hair, remove clothes and draw this person bald and in skin tone underwear
breasts, woman, large breasts, small head
Replace background with white background. draw this character with arms at sides

change character face on image 1 to precisely match the character face from image 2.

light smile expression

Use extra prompt to steer output (refine pose, fix details, etc).

作者的帖子
https://www.reddit.com/r/comfyui/comments/1rung4d/flux2_character_replacer_workflow_new_version_24/

作者的另一个原理帖子
https://www.reddit.com/r/StableDiffusion/comments/1qwpqek/comment/o9ae0fm/


依赖插件

https://github.com/BigStationW/ComfyUI-NAG
